description: N+1 query problem causing performance degradation by fetching related data in a loop

expected_issues.description: GET /posts endpoint fetches authors in a loop, causing N+1 queries. For 100 posts, this makes 101 database queries (1 for posts + 100 for authors) instead of 2 queries with a JOIN.
expected_issues.impact: Severe performance degradation with large datasets, increased database load, slow response times, potential timeout on high traffic
expected_issues.cwe: CWE-1050: Excessive Platform Resource Consumption within a Loop

expected_issues.description: GET /posts/:id endpoint fetches comment authors in a loop, causing N+1 queries. For a post with 50 comments, this makes 51 queries (1 for comments + 50 for authors).
expected_issues.impact: Slow page load for posts with many comments, increased database load

expected_tests.description: GET /posts should make only 2 queries regardless of post count
